nasb.text: we have sinned, committed iniquity, acted wickedly and rebelled, even turning aside from Your commandments and ordinances.

esv.text: we have sinned and done wrong and acted wickedly and rebelled, turning aside from your commandments and rules.

cnv.text: 我們犯了罪，行了不義，作了惡，背叛了你，偏離了你的誡命典章；

ccb.text: 我们犯罪作恶，行为邪恶叛逆，偏离你的诫命和典章，
